format_notes.purpose: Canonical web content structure for rulebook/reference rendering.

sections.title: Playing the Game
sections.summary: Core gameplay loop, scene types, dice systems, success states, and character fundamentals.

blocks.text: Playing the game unfolds in a repeating loop: the Keeper presents a scene, adventurers describe their response, checks may be called for, outcomes are resolved, and the scene continues until it ends.

entries.name: Downtime
entries.text: Training, tasks, injury recovery, business, and longer-term activity.

entries.name: Exploration
entries.text: Travel across large areas or roaming the wilds.

entries.name: Investigation
entries.text: Seeking information, dungeon searching, or urban inquiry.

entries.name: Skirmish
entries.text: Conflict, chases, duels, or combat where time is kept strictly by rounds.

entries.name: Combat
entries.text: Use a d20 roll plus modifiers against a defense or DC.

entries.name: Skills
entries.text: Use a d6 dice-pool; count successes and meet or exceed the target.

entries.name: D20 Resolve
entries.text: Roll twice and keep the higher result.

entries.name: D20 Strain
entries.text: Roll twice and keep the lower result.

entries.name: D6 Resolve
entries.text: Reroll up to 3 failed dice and keep the higher result.

entries.name: D6 Strain
entries.text: Reroll up to 3 successful dice and keep the lower result.

entries.name: D20 Critical Success
entries.text: 10 or more above the target.

entries.name: D20 Success
entries.text: Meet or exceed the target.

entries.name: D20 Failure
entries.text: Below the target.

entries.name: D20 Critical Failure
entries.text: 10 or more below the target.

entries.name: D6 Critical Success
entries.text: 2 or more successes above target.

entries.name: D6 Success
entries.text: Meets target exactly.

entries.name: D6 Failure
entries.text: 1 short of target.

entries.name: D6 Critical Failure
entries.text: 2 or more short of target.

entries.name: Body
entries.text: Physical control, power, and stability.

entries.name: Mind
entries.text: Mental acuity, analysis, and memory.

entries.name: Will
entries.text: Resolve, focus, and emotional composure.

blocks.text: At creation, start with four +1 attribute points to distribute, with a maximum of +3 in any one attribute. Additional attributes are gained from vocation and by gaining +1 every two feats.

blocks.label: Tier
blocks.value: Culmination of experience based on feats; caps at Tier 5.

blocks.label: Vitality
blocks.value: Based on profession and Body; damage is absorbed here before wounds.

blocks.label: Wounds
blocks.value: (Body ÷ 2) + Tier. If total wounds taken meet or exceed this value, the adventurer dies immediately.

entries.name: Armor Defense
entries.text: 10 + armor type or feats.

entries.name: Body Defense
entries.text: 10 + Body.

entries.name: Mind Defense
entries.text: 10 + Mind.

entries.name: Will Defense
entries.text: 10 + Will.

blocks.text: Ambition is a universal resource spent to affect dice checks. The booklet includes an ambition die progression based on Will and Tier.

sections.title: Proficiency and Skills
sections.summary: Skill framework, proficiencies, stealth rules, and spellcasting basics.

blocks.text: There are four proficiency categories gained from profession and origin: V.I.T.A.L.S., Tool Kits, Armaments, and Protections.

entries.name: V.I.T.A.L.S.
entries.text: Skills used for skill checks. Add extra d6s equal to adventurer Tier to all checks using that skill.

entries.name: Tool Kits
entries.text: Relevant kits grant bonuses when proficient.

entries.name: Armaments
entries.text: Add Tier to attack and damage rolls with proficient weapon groups.

entries.name: Protections
entries.text: Armor proficiency prevents penalties; without it, you take Strain on specified checks and attacks/casting.

blocks.text: A stealth check is a d20 check: d20 + Body (if proficient in Talent) + bonuses against a target's Mind Defense.

entries.name: Unseen Success
entries.text: Become Hidden to all with equal or lower Mind Defense.

entries.name: Unseen Critical Success
entries.text: As success, and gain +3 to Body Defense against Scan while Hidden.

entries.name: Seen Success
entries.text: Gain Unaware against that target.

entries.name: Seen Critical Success
entries.text: As success against all that see you.

entries.name: Full Caster
entries.text: (2 × Tier) + Spellcasting Modifier

entries.name: Half Caster
entries.text: (1 × Tier) + Spellcasting Modifier

entries.name: Limited Caster
entries.text: (1/2 × Tier) + Spellcasting Modifier

entries.name: Spell Attack
entries.text: Spellcasting Modifier + Tier of Spell.

entries.name: Spell DC
entries.text: 10 + Tier of Spell + Spellcasting Modifier.

entries.name: Prepared Spells
entries.text: Equal to Spellcasting Modifier.

entries.name: Line
entries.text: Straight line from caster.

entries.name: Cone
entries.text: Triangle shape from caster.

entries.name: Burst
entries.text: Expands out from origin.

entries.name: Emanation
entries.text: Follows the caster.

entries.name: Pinpoint
entries.text: 5 ft / 1.5 m or single target.

entries.name: Cluster
entries.text: 10 ft / 3 m or small room.

entries.name: Sector
entries.text: 20 ft / 6 m or large room.

entries.name: Field
entries.text: 30 ft / 10 m or grand room.

entries.name: Focused Spells
entries.text: Only one Focused spell may occupy a caster's Focus at once.

entries.name: Ritual Spells
entries.text: Cannot be used in a skirmish; take at least 10 minutes and use daily limits by tier.

entries.name: Amps
entries.text: Optional spell upgrades paid with additional Reservoir.

entries.name: Spell Vellums
entries.text: Single-use spell items used by casters or non-casters with checks as listed.

sections.title: Adventurer Creation
sections.summary: Character creation steps, starting stats, and origins/vocations.

entries.name: Body / Mind / Will
entries.text: Begin at 0 in each.

entries.name: Point Allocation
entries.text: Distribute 4 points, maximum +3 per stat.

entries.name: Origin Bonus
entries.text: Origin grants +1 to Body, Mind, or Will based on vocation.

children.title: Origins and Vocation
children.summary: Origins define upbringing; vocation determines which attribute bonus is gained.

entries.name: Acolyte
entries.starting_items: Healing kit, religious items and clothing

entries.name: Apprentice
entries.starting_items: Crafting supplies, personal project, rare sample

entries.name: Boroughborn
entries.starting_items: Personal stash, rumor leads, city passes

entries.name: Cursed
entries.starting_items: Exile pack, cursed trinket, ritual supplies

entries.name: Farmhand
entries.starting_items: Farming tools, preserved food, animal kit

entries.name: Nobility
entries.starting_items: Fine clothing, signet, letters of introduction

entries.name: Hunter
entries.starting_items: Survival kit, trade goods, nomadic gear

sections.title: Professions
sections.summary: Core class definitions, resources, proficiencies, and class feats.

entries.name: Agent
entries.role: Specialist who scouts, infiltrates, and strikes with tricks and alchemy.
entries.proficiency: Skills 2 (Tal/Aware/Int/Soc) | Kit Thievery | Arms Fins./Smpl. | Prot Light

entries.name: Berserker
entries.role: Frontline brute fueled for destruction through rage at a cost.

entries.name: Drifter
entries.role: Adaptive primal half-caster mixing survival, shapeshifting, and spirit magic.
entries.proficiency: Skills 1 (Vig/Aware/Lore) | Kit Med/Alc | Arms Primeval/Smpl./Caty. | Prot Light

entries.name: Duelist
entries.role: Precision skirmisher dominates with techniques and counters.

entries.name: Eidolon
entries.role: Full-caster whose inherited magic bends and shapes magic.
entries.proficiency: Skills 1 (Aware/Lore/Soc) | Kit Craft/Eng/Med | Arms Cat +1 choice | Prot None

entries.name: Fighter
entries.role: Battlefield weapon master using schools, stances, and burst exertion.

entries.name: Phagite
entries.role: Soul-powered full-caster trading life force for control, debuffs, and momentum.
entries.proficiency: Skills 1 (Any) | Kit 1 (Outr./Thievery) | Arms Smpl./Caty. | Prot None

entries.name: Warden
entries.role: Anti-magic hunter blending martial pressure with arcane skill.
entries.proficiency: Skills 2 (Vig/Intu/Tal/Aware) | Kit 1 (Med/Outr.) | Arms Caty./Simple/Fins. | Prot Light/Med

entries.name: Mage
entries.role: Scholarly full-caster who controls with prepared spells, spheres, and research.
entries.proficiency: Skills 1 (Intu/Aware/Lore) | Kit Craft/Alc | Arms Smpl./Caty. | Prot None

entries.name: Mercenary
entries.role: Versatile hired blade who borrows techniques and fills gaps with modular training.
entries.proficiency: Skills 2 (Any) | Kit 1 choice | Arms Simple +1 choice | Prot L/M+Shields

entries.name: Mesmer
entries.role: Mental manipulator of perception and reality with tethers and stitched cords.

entries.name: Oathbound
entries.role: Devout half-caster who anchors power in a creed to heal, protect, and punish.
entries.proficiency: Skills (Intu/Aware/Lore/Soc) | Kit 1 (Alc/Med) | Arms Simple/Caty./Lt Xbow | Prot Light+Shield

sections.title: Character Progression
sections.summary: Feat-based progression, renown economy, and path choices by profession.

blocks.text: Progression is primarily shaped through feats purchased with Renown gained from adventures and role-play.

entries.name: Profession
entries.text: Advance class and define mechanical identity.

entries.name: Origin
entries.text: Provide thematic identity, utility, and narrative expression tied to origin.

entries.name: Universal
entries.text: Flexible options for any build or playstyle.
At start and end of session.
Per skirmish.

entries.name: +2–3
entries.text: Defeating a boss.

entries.name: +2–3
entries.text: Dungeon clear.
Creative solutions.
Side quest or major quest.
Downtime or meaningful roleplay.

children.title: The Path
children.summary: Each profession has two path directions.

entries.name: Agent
entries.text: Path of the Alchemist; Path of the Infiltrator

entries.name: Berserker
entries.text: Path of the Frenzied; Path of the Titan

entries.name: Drifter
entries.text: Path of the Conduit; Path of the Channeler

entries.name: Duelist
entries.text: Path of the Gladiator; Path of the Marauder

entries.name: Eidolon
entries.text: Path of the Spellshaper; Path of the Prodigy

entries.name: Fighter
entries.text: Path of the Sentinel; Path of the Reaver

entries.name: Mage
entries.text: Path of the Enchanter; Artificer

entries.name: Mercenary
entries.text: Path of the Freelancer; Commander

entries.name: Mesmer
entries.text: Path of the Spectre; Path of the Weaver

entries.name: Oathbound
entries.text: Path of the Herald; Path of the Arbiter

entries.name: Phagite
entries.text: Path of the Anima; Path of the Animus

entries.name: Warden
entries.text: Path of the Watcher; Path of the Vanguard

entries.name: Agent
entries.text: Two daggers; bow with quiver (20 arrows); thieves' tools; rope (50 ft); smoke pebbles (3).

entries.name: Berserker
entries.text: Great axe or maul; two throwing axes; base medium armor.

entries.name: Duelist
entries.text: Rapier or longsword; short sword or cestus; buckler; base light armor.

entries.name: Drifter
entries.text: Quarterstaff; two daggers; component pouch; wilderness survival kit; base light armor.

entries.name: Eidolon
entries.text: Magic wand; dagger or light weapon of choice.

entries.name: Fighter
entries.text: Two melee weapons of choice; one ranged weapon of choice or shield; base medium armor; shield.

entries.name: Mage
entries.text: Magic stave; dagger; spellbook or arcane focus; component pouch.

entries.name: Mercenary
entries.text: Two weapons of choice; base light or medium armor; shield.

entries.name: Mesmer
entries.text: Focus crystal or light weapon of choice.

entries.name: Oathbound
entries.text: Simple weapon of choice; magic staff or talisman; holy symbol; healer's kit; base light armor; shield.

entries.name: Phagite
entries.text: Ritual dagger; occult staff or wand; component pouch.

entries.name: Warden
entries.text: Simple melee of choice; arcane implement; anti-magic vials (2); base medium armor; shield.

sections.title: Combat
sections.summary: Initiative, action points, engagement, damage, conditions, and recovery.

blocks.text: A skirmish is structured combat resolved with d20 rolls for speed and clarity. Skill checks still use the d6 system but should be rare in battle.

items: On your turn, regain 4 AP and spend AP on actions.
Apply damage to Vitality; 0 Vitality risks wounds and death.

entries.name: Party Roll
entries.text: Roll one d6 for each adventurer in the skirmish.

entries.name: Keeper Roll
entries.text: Roll one fewer d6 than the party and add Adventurer Tier; the roll stays hidden until combat begins.

entries.name: Ambition Option
entries.text: Before reveal, players may roll Ambition using the group's highest Ambition die to try to win initiative.

entries.name: Melee/Touch
entries.text: Within reach or engagement.

entries.name: Self
entries.text: Originates from your position.

entries.name: Close
entries.text: Within your zone.

entries.name: Nearby
entries.text: One zone away.

entries.name: Far
entries.text: Up to two zones away.

entries.name: Distant
entries.text: Up to three zones away.

entries.name: Sight
entries.text: Anything within sight.

entries.name: Weapon Strike
entries.text: 2 AP; weapon attack vs Armor.

entries.name: Dual Strike
entries.text: 2 AP; one attack per weapon; penalties apply.

entries.name: Power Strike
entries.text: 3 AP; double weapon/cantrip dice; -5 to hit.

entries.name: Cast a Spell
entries.text: 2 AP.

entries.name: Snap Cantrip
entries.text: 1 AP after Cast a Spell this turn.

entries.name: Grapple / Shove / Trip
entries.text: Body-based control actions.

entries.name: Dash
entries.text: 2 AP; move to adjacent zone.

entries.name: Disengage
entries.text: 1 AP; end engagement.

entries.name: Dodge
entries.text: 2 AP; attacks against you have Strain until your next turn.

entries.name: Hide
entries.text: 2 AP; make a stealth check.

entries.name: Jump
entries.text: 1 AP; 5 ft / 1.5 m per point in Body.

entries.name: Aid
entries.text: Reduce or remove a condition with an appropriate check.

entries.name: Assist
entries.text: Touch ally gains Resolve on next non-combat roll.

entries.name: Distract
entries.text: Impair a target's next attack.

entries.name: Flank
entries.text: Grant Resolve to next ally attack.

entries.name: Scan
entries.text: d20 + Mind vs target Stealth DC.

entries.name: Brace / Cover / Skill Use / Stand / Go Prone
entries.text: General tactical actions.

entries.name: Command / Recollection / Persuade / Interact / Held Action
entries.text: Narrative and utility options.

blocks.text: Most attacks roll a d20 against Armor, though some effects target Body, Mind, or Will. A successful melee hit creates engagement.

entries.name: Physical
entries.text: Slash, Blunt, Puncture, Poison.

entries.name: Magical
entries.text: Arcane, Ether, Void, Psychic.

entries.name: Elemental
entries.text: Fire, Ice, Electric, Corrosive.

entries.name: Esoteric
entries.text: Cosmic, Gravity, Spirit.

entries.name: Resistance
entries.text: Step damage dice down by one size; d4 damage instead rolls with Strain.

entries.name: Weakness
entries.text: Step damage dice up by one size; d12 damage instead rolls with Resolve.

entries.name: Immunity
entries.text: No damage from that type.

entries.name: Crippled
entries.text: AP -1.

entries.name: Bleeding
entries.text: Start-of-turn damage; stacks.

entries.name: Burning
entries.text: Start-of-turn fire damage; stacks.

entries.name: Blinded
entries.text: Strain attacks and Body checks; foes count Unaware to you.

entries.name: Frightened
entries.text: Strain versus source.

entries.name: Dazed
entries.text: Mind -4; -4 attacks.

entries.name: Prone
entries.text: Restricted movement; Body -5.

entries.name: Restrained
entries.text: Cannot move; must pass flat DC 5 to use actions.

entries.name: Unconscious
entries.text: No AP; prone; recovery checks apply.

entries.name: Respites
entries.text: 10–60 minutes, 3 uses per adventurer; recover Vitality and Ambition.

entries.name: Long Rest
entries.text: 6–8 hours; recover larger Vitality, Ambition, and Reservoir amounts; regain 1 respite use.

entries.name: Full Rest
entries.text: 48 hours in a safe location; fully restores most resources and removes 1 wound.

entries.name: Medicine Check Healing
entries.text: Awareness or Intuition check; healing amount based on chosen Tier DC; once per hour per target.

sections.title: Equipment
sections.summary: Inventory, kits, weapons, armor, shields, qualities, augments, and item traits.

blocks.text: Items usually take one slot unless they are Light or Heavy. Total item slots are based on Carry Weight: 5 + Body + Tier.

entries.name: Light
entries.text: Up to 10 count as one slot.

entries.name: Heavy
entries.text: Takes two slots.

entries.name: Full Inventory
entries.text: Items cannot be stowed, though they may still be physically carried.

blocks.text: Kits improve task effectiveness. Relevant kits grant +1 automatic success, and proficiency upgrades the benefit further.

entries.name: Armaments
entries.text: Weapons grouped by proficiency: Simple, Martial, Finesse, Ranged, Defensive, Catalysts.

entries.name: Protection
entries.text: Armor types are Light, Medium, and Heavy. Shields also have armor bonus and reduction pool values.

entries.name: Ammunition
entries.text: Usually abstracted per skirmish unless using gritty tracking, thrown weapons, or special ammo.

entries.name: Masterwork Quality
entries.text: Common +0, Superior +1, Mastered +2, Fabled +3.

entries.name: Augments
entries.text: Installed in item slots; can be passive, triggered, or limited-use.

entries.name: Magic Items
entries.text: Normal equipment with additional effects, often using charges or cooldowns.

entries.name: Adaptive
entries.text: Can be used one- or two-handed; 2H steps die up.

entries.name: Brace
entries.text: Works with Brace action.

entries.name: Catalyst
entries.text: Allows spellcasting while wielded.

entries.name: Concealable / Hidden
entries.text: Can be hidden on the body.

entries.name: Heavy / Light
entries.text: Weight and wielding implications.

entries.name: Reach
entries.text: Melee strike without engaging.

entries.name: Reload X
entries.text: AP needed to reload.

entries.name: Rend / Piercer / Thrown / Two-handed
entries.text: Special combat properties.

entries.name: Thieves' Tools
entries.text: Pick locks, disable traps, bypass mechanisms.

entries.name: Disguise Kit
entries.text: Create disguises and false identities.

entries.name: Survival Kit
entries.text: Forced marches, climate resistance, hazards.

entries.name: Wilderness Survival Kit
entries.text: Track, forage, improvise shelter.

entries.name: Animal Handling Kit
entries.text: Calm, direct, and diagnose animals.

entries.name: Navigation Tools
entries.text: Chart courses and avoid becoming lost.

entries.name: Fishing Gear
entries.text: Harvest aquatic food.

entries.name: Healer's Kit
entries.text: First aid, stabilize, treat wounds.

entries.name: Injury Treatment Supplies
entries.text: Battlefield triage.

entries.name: Trauma Kit
entries.text: Suppress wounds on the recently fallen.

entries.name: Reactant Pouch
entries.text: Identify magical residue and materials.

entries.name: Spare Parts / Repair Kit / Polishing Kit
entries.text: Engineering and upkeep tools.

entries.name: Trade Tools / Quality Assessment Tools
entries.text: Appraise, haggle, inspect workmanship.

entries.name: Tribal Tattoo Kit / Divination Scrolls / Personal Grooming Set / Forgery Tools
entries.text: Unproficient or special-use kits.

sections.title: Known Spells and Spell List
sections.summary: Known spell progression, spellcasting thresholds, and spell lists by source and sphere.

blocks.text: Spellcasting advances when a character reaches 0, 3, 6, 8, 10, 12, and 14 unlocked feats purchased with Renown.

entries.name: Anima
entries.text: Includes Allure (T1), Altered Thoughts (T1), Healing Word (T1), Disrupt Magic (T2), Invisibility (T2), Barrier (T3), Lighting Bolt (T3), Void Warp (T3), and more.

entries.name: Mana
entries.text: Includes Animate Carrion (T1), Arcane Needles (T1), Shield (T1), Arcane Chains (T2), Ethereal Armament (T2), Barrier (T3), Incinerate (T3), Temporal Distortion (T3), and more.

entries.name: Primeval
entries.text: Includes Bitter Chill (T1), Cure Wounds (T1), Guidance (T1), Blight Cloud (T2), Primeval Growth (T2), Blind Sacrifice (T3), Stabilize (T3), and more.

entries.name: Soul
entries.text: Includes Command (T1), Cure Wounds (T1), Shield of Faith (T1), Blinding Radiance (T2), Hysteria (T2), Vitality Transfer (T2), Barrier (T3), Harvest (T3), and more.

entries.name: Universal
entries.text: Detect Life (T1), Fear (T1), Jump (T1), Light (T1), Mending (T1), Slow Fall (T1), Spell Armor (T1), Vital Reinforcement (T2).

entries.name: Aberration
entries.text: Includes Allure (T1), Cursed (T1), Resonant Distortion (T1), Arcane Chains (T2), Hysteria (T2), Confusing Apparitions (T3), Shared Invisibility (T3).

entries.name: Augmentation
entries.text: Includes Altered Thoughts (T1), Fleet Footing (T1), Terraform (T1), Arcane Bastion (T2), Spider Climb (T2), Alacrity (T3), Mist Form (T3).

entries.name: Conjuration
entries.text: Includes Alarm (T1), Elderberry Vines (T1), Summoned Familiar (T1), Call of the Wild (T2), Summon Portals (T2), Banner of War (T3), Void Warp (T3).

entries.name: Decimation
entries.text: Includes Arcane Needles (T1), Bitter Chill (T1), Seeking Bolt (T1), Corrosive Lance (T2), Razor Wind (T2), Lighting Bolt (T3), Void Feast (T3).

entries.name: Divination
entries.text: Includes Commune with Animals (T1), Detect Life (T1), Detect Magic (T1), Astral Sign (T2), Inquiry (T2), Primeval Senses (T2).

entries.name: Mortification
entries.text: Includes Animate Carrion (T1), Grave Touch (T1), Torment (T1), Blight Cloud (T2), Crimson Veil (T2), Void Armor (T2), Enfeebled (T3), Harvest (T3).

entries.name: Reclamation
entries.text: Includes Calming Word (T1), Cure Wounds (T1), Shield (T1), Disrupt Magic (T2), Healing Spirit (T2), Mystic Bulwark (T2), Barrier (T3), Radiant Vitality (T3).

sections.title: The Role of the Keeper
sections.summary: GM-facing guidance for running sessions, awarding renown, and preparing skirmishes.

blocks.text: The Keeper is the primary storyteller and arbiter. Their role is not to defeat the adventurers, but to engage in narratives where player and Keeper choices matter.

entries.name: World Building
entries.text: Develop settings, locations, and NPCs.

entries.name: Rules Arbitration
entries.text: Make fair judgments on rules questions.

entries.name: Narrative Direction
entries.text: Keep the story moving while staying flexible.

entries.name: Challenge Creation
entries.text: Design encounters, puzzles, and combat.

entries.name: Pacing
entries.text: Balance action, exploration, social scenes, and downtime.

entries.name: Renown Distribution
entries.text: Award advancement consistently.

blocks.label: Golden Rule
blocks.value: If a rule interferes with enjoyment, change it.

entries.name: Opening
entries.text: Recap events, address questions, state objectives.

entries.name: Adventure Segments
entries.text: Alternate exploration, social, and combat while watching pacing.

entries.name: Rest Points
entries.text: Allow spell prep, plot hooks, and character moments.

entries.name: Conclusion
entries.text: End at logical breakpoints; recap and gather player intentions.

entries.name: Personal
entries.text: Tied to backstories.

entries.name: Mysteries
entries.text: Unexplained events that provoke curiosity.

entries.name: Threats
entries.text: Dangers to people adventurers care about.

entries.name: Opportunities
entries.text: Wealth, knowledge, or power.

entries.name: Requests
entries.text: Direct NPC or faction appeals.

entries.name: Linear
entries.text: Straightforward progression.

entries.name: Branching
entries.text: Divergent routes that reconverge later.

entries.name: Open-World
entries.text: Sandbox with maximum freedom.

entries.name: Hub-and-Spoke
entries.text: Central base with outward adventure sites.

items: Select forces at roughly 1.5× party tier in challenge value, then adjust.

entries.name: Attrition
entries.text: One side breaks, flees, or is wiped out.

entries.name: Capture
entries.text: Seize a living target, relic, or position and hold it.

entries.name: Disruption
entries.text: Interrupt enemy activity before completion.

entries.name: Escort
entries.text: Protect a target to destination.

entries.name: Escape
entries.text: Reach an exit before the threat closes in.

entries.name: Heist
entries.text: Infiltration, theft, and escape.

entries.name: Peacemaker
entries.text: Reduce hostility through negotiation.

entries.name: Puzzle
entries.text: Arcane machinery or riddles drive the encounter.

entries.name: Rescue
entries.text: Liberate prisoners and extract them.

entries.name: Stronghold
entries.text: Repel waves until relief arrives.

entries.name: Timed
entries.text: Any objective under a hard clock.

rows: Hazard HP = 5× tier; mishandling triggers a zone-wide effect.
Additional identical waves arrive every 2 rounds after the first is bloodied.
Enemies act in surprise Round 0 unless PCs succeed on Mind checks.
A second group with its own agenda arrives.
A major foe enters mid-fight or begins on the field.
Party starts unseen and may reposition before initiative.
Opposition CR totals 50% lower than party tier.
blocks.title: Wildcards Quick Reference
